content.en:
When Ye Tian was fighting with the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, he used a lot of the power of the Extreme Dao, so when he fought against the Devouring Clan's Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, it was impossible to use the power of the Extreme Dao all the time, and he only regarded the power of the Extreme Dao as a killer weapon.

As time passed, the scales of victory began to lean towards the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm.

One by one, the half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm fell into Ye Tian's hands, and Ye Tian went to kill those ordinary Devouring Clan half-step domain ancestors, almost one blow and one kill, it was too easy.

It didn't take long for the number of half-step domain ancestors of the Devouring Clan to drop significantly, and they began to be on par with the half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and the other half-step domain ancestors from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm basically didn't have much pressure.

Therefore, the Invincible Dao Ancestors did not need to block the Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Devouring Clan, and began to surround and kill the Invincible Dao Ancestors of the Devouring Clan with all their might.

A few hours later.

All the Devouring Clans in the realm below the Half-Step Domain Ancestor were wiped out, and even the Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Devouring Clan suffered heavy losses.

At this moment, the power of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor's treasure was about to be exhausted.

Once his strength is exhausted, he will not be the opponent of the Wind Mountain Lord at all, and he will not be able to support it for long at all.

"Retreat!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor said helplessly.

If he doesn't retreat, the other Devourers are estimated to be finished, and even he is estimated to be finished.

The Blood Emperor Ancestor, the War Emperor Ancestor, and the Wanzhen Emperor Ancestor had also wanted to withdraw for a long time, so as soon as they heard the words of the White Deer Emperor Ancestor, they immediately prepared to leave.

"Devourer, all retreat!"

The four great emperors and ancestors passed on the word.

Whew!!

The Four Great Emperor Ancestors withdrew in an instant, and the other Devouring Clans also shuttled away one by one.

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor secretly scolded the other Devouring Clans for being a waste, but the other Devouring Clans all retreated, and he alone couldn't compete with so many Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors!

Once the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord and Ling Tian Dao Ancestor united, there might be hope that they would all stay with him.

As a result, the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor also withdrew.

When they withdrew, the Devouring Clan was killed by several more half-step domain ancestors.

"Stop chasing!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain stopped the half-step domain ancestors who wanted to hunt down and kill the Devouring Clan, after all, he still understood the truth of the poor Kou Mo chasing!

What if you chase after you and fall into an ambush by the Devourers?

Besides, who can guarantee that the Devourer will have no other hole cards?

So, take it when you see it.

After the Devouring Clan retreated, the Dao Ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm also began to pack up the corpses of their companions and returned to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm one by one.

After this battle, the Devouring Clan did not dare to invade the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm again, or in a short period of time.

------------------

Black Wind Mountain.

The half-step domain ancestors came back one by one, and immediately sorted out the losses.

This time, the Black Wind Mountain also suffered a lot of losses, and it lost nearly a thousand Supreme Dao Ancestors, although it is easier to give birth to a Supreme Dao Ancestor in today's era, but it is really too much to lose thousands of Supreme Dao Ancestors at once.

In the past, where did there be so many Supreme Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, and all the Supreme Dao Ancestors added up to far less than a thousand!

And Black Wind Mountain also fell more than twenty invincible Dao Ancestors, and such losses were also heavy.

Even the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, Black Wind Mountain, had fallen by three.

Fortunately, thanks to the half-step domain ancestor level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, the Black Wind Mountain did not fall a single one, which is a fortunate thing.

After Ye Tian came back, it took a long time to heal his injuries before he finally recovered from his injuries.

After all, he was injured by the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, such an injury was not an ordinary injury, even the power of the forbidden origin was difficult to repair quickly, and it took a long time of retreat and cultivation to recover slowly.

And just to heal, he spent thousands of years, and he also healed within the time array, and the time it really took far exceeded the thousand years.

After recovering from his injuries, Ye Tian often went in and out of the cultivation space of the Eternal Source Stone Statue, and often relied on the Eternal Source Stone Statue to comprehend the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian's talent and potential are indeed very powerful, especially since he has a large number of forbidden talents, and he surpasses others in cultivation I don't know how many times.

But in the mysteries of the Enlightenment Domain, the forbidden talent is useless, only one's own comprehension is useful.

Ye Tian's comprehension is indeed very high, and he also has a super god-level super comprehension talent, but it is still a little difficult to quickly comprehend the mysteries of the domain ancestor.

Fortunately, Black Wind Mountain has an Eternal Source Stone Statue, otherwise with his speed of comprehension, it will take a long time to realize more of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor.

The Devouring Clan suffered heavy losses this time, and did not continue to attack, and the powerhouses of the Xuanxuan to the Ancient Realm did not dare to attack the Devouring Realm, after all, it was the old lair of the Devouring Clan, and if they were not careful, they would be finished.

The Devouring Clan is not a Forbidden Zerg, the Forbidden Zerg has not grown at all, but the Devouring Clan has grown, and there is also the background of the Domain Ancestor level.

As a result, the major powers are not willing to take risks.

Besides, if they are given time, the major forces can develop rapidly.

As long as a domain ancestor is born, Xuanxu will dare to attack the Devouring Realm when he reaches the Ancient Realm.

Therefore, the major forces from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm are not in a hurry at all, and what is really anxious is the Devouring Clan.

Without the threat of the Devouring Clan, Ye Tian naturally had time to cultivate.

Ten thousand years and ten thousand years passed, and Ye Tian was completely immersed in the mysteries of the Realm Ancestor, and this cultivation had passed for a full 3 million years.

After 3 million years of comprehension, and with the Eternal Source Stone Statue as an aid, Ye Tian had comprehended enough of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor and had enough understanding of the Domain Ancestor level.

Once the half-step Domain Ancestor's Realm Consummation Body and the Forbidden Dao of the Ten Thousand Realm Realm are perfectly fused, and the forbidden body reaches ten percent consummation, and then grasp the true meaning of the Domain Ancestor, you can impact the Domain Ancestor Realm.

But the real Domain Ancestor Realm is itself a small forbidden origin, which can control the forbidden rule avenue, and their forbidden dao can be combined by itself, thus creating more incredible secret techniques and domain techniques.

And the mystery of the domain ancestor refers to the evolution and change of the taboo rules, and only by allowing the taboo rules that you understand to continue to evolve can you cause the transformation of the spirit and spirit, so as to be promoted to a half-step domain ancestor.

And now, Ye Tian has comprehended enough domain ancestor mysteries, and he is already sure to be promoted to a half-step domain ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian began his retreat in the human realm, preparing to impact the half-step domain ancestor realm.
